news.t: Xtrackers by DWS Launches Europe Defense Technologies ETF

holdings.infoBox: XDEF is an equity ETF with a total of 39 individual holdings. The top holdings are Airbus SE stock at 9.42%, Rolls-Royce Holdings at 9.36%, Safran at 9.12%, BAE Systems at 7.01%, and Rheinmetall AG at 6.55%.

overview.description: The Xtrackers Europe Defense Technologies ETF (XDEF) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in industrials equity. The fund tracks a market-cap index of equity securities issued by European companies in the defense, space, and cybersecurity sectors. XDEF was launched on Feb 19, 2026 and is issued by Xtrackers.
infoTable: STOXX Europe Total Market Defence Space and Cybersecurity Innovation 50-25 Index

data.title: Xtrackers by DWS Launches Europe Defense Technologies ETF
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--DWS, a leading European asset manager with global reach, today announced the launch of the Xtrackers Europe Defense Technologies ETF (Nasdaq: XDEF) (the “Fund”). The Fund se...
